case_title: ENCINAS, IRMA VS AMAYA, MARIO BENITEZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,300.00 FILED BY ENCINAS, IRMA AS TO DEFENDANT AMAYA, MARIO BENITEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-18-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ENCINAS, IRMA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AMAYA, MARIO BENITEZ DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO PLAINTIFF RAISING CLAIMS IN SUPERIOR COURT CASE #174088. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
